\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
A module for finite element method. 

This class handles the initialization and computation for finite element method (FEM) simulations, providing methods to set up and solve linear systems, assemble FEM operators, and perform result checks. 

Definition at line 79 of file Fem\+Module.\+h.

Applies dirichlet to LHS matrix and RHS vector of the linear system on Gpu. 

This function applies Dirichlet boundary conditions to both the LHS matrix and RHS vector of the linear system using GPU acceleration.

{\em rhs\+\_\+values} & The variable representing the RHS vector to be updated. \\

\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{\_doStationarySolve()}{\_doStationarySolve()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily void Fem\+Module\+Elasticity\+::\+\_\+do\+Stationary\+Solve (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}{ }\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Performs a stationary solve for the FEM system. 

This method follows a sequence of steps to solve FEM system\+:


\begin{DoxyEnumerate}
\item \+\_\+get\+Material\+Parameters() Retrieves material parameters via
\item \mbox{\hyperlink{classFemModuleElasticity_aaa11f39de79f8c84022f82bb6cf03b7e}{\+\_\+assemble\+Bilinear\+Operator()}} Assembles the FEM matrix 𝐀
\item \+\_\+assemble\+Linear\+Operator() Assembles the FEM RHS vector 𝐛
\item \+\_\+solve() Solves for solution vector 𝐮 = 𝐀⁻¹𝐛
\item \+\_\+update\+Variables() Updates FEM variables 𝐮 = 𝐱
\item \+\_\+validate\+Results() Regression test 
\end{DoxyEnumerate}

\mbox{\Hypertarget{classFemModuleElasticity_ad3bb0f9040e4141ceef536038cd61a2d}\label{classFemModuleElasticity_ad3bb0f9040e4141ceef536038cd61a2d}} 
\index{FemModuleElasticity@{FemModuleElasticity}!computeDivU@{computeDivU}}
\index{computeDivU@{computeDivU}!FemModuleElasticity@{FemModuleElasticity}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{computeDivU()}{computeDivU()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily void Fem\+Module\+Elasticity\+::compute\+DivU (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}{ }\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [override]}}



Method called at the beginning of the simulation. 

Performs the main computation for the \mbox{\hyperlink{classFemModuleElasticity}{Fem\+Module\+Elasticity}}.

This method\+:
\begin{DoxyEnumerate}
\item Stops the time loop after 1 iteration since the equation is steady state.
\item Resets, configures, and initializes the linear system.
\item Sets PETSc flags if user has provided them.
\item Executes the stationary solve. 
\end{DoxyEnumerate}
